rulings.Calendar Matter: Re Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 31, 2016 line 2. PETITIONER JENNY KIM's Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator Hearing Required to address Proof of Service for Petition to Compel Arbitration filed on September 27, 2016 indicating that Ms. Shevock and Ms. Ekstrom were sub served by leaving copies of the petition with Mr. Edwards "a competent member" of each Ms. Shevock and Ms. Ekstrom households. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SUE WILLIAMS VS. HSINHONG YEH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Hsinhong Yeh To Answer Question Posed At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 31, 2016 line 3. PLAINTIFF SUE WILLIAMS' Motion To Compel Defendant Hsinhong Yeh To Answer Question Posed At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction transferred to depart 301 to be heard on November 10, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. CHRISTOPHER O'CONNOR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 31, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER O'CONNOR, JESSICA VALENZUELA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Allegations in the complaint must be taken as true for the purposes of the demurrer. Whether alleged short-term rental is illegal or not per SF. Admin. Code 41A.5(g) is an issue of fact that cannot be properly addressed on a demurrer. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. EMILY FLANNERY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 31, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANT EMILY FLANNERY MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: KRISTINE VALKANOFF VS. PATRICK NORRIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 31, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT PATRICK NORRIS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL Hearing Required to address why motions to compel discovery (basis for trial continuance request) have not been timely filed on October 26, 2016. = (501/LOT)
